name: Carrots in Orange-Basil Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the carrots into julienne strips.
2. Heat the butter in a pan over medium heat until melted and hot.
3. Add the carrot strips to the pan and toss to coat evenly.
4. Stir in the water, orange peel, crushed basil, and parsley (if using).
5. Cook for 8-10 minutes or until the carrots are tender.
6. Turn off the heat and serve immediately.
